problem id: c4d2cf2c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6)

examples:
  10110010 -> 10000000
  11011011 -> 11000000
  11010110 -> 10000000
  01011010 -> 10000000
  00010111 -> 11000000
  01110101 -> 01000000
  11110010 -> 10000000
  10001101 -> 01000000
  01000111 -> 11000000

query: 10110111
predicted answer: 11000000
